rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §31.023 governs instructional material review by the agency and the State Board of Education. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: The commissioner shall establish, in consultation with and with the approval of the State Board of Education, a process for the annual review of instructional materials by the agency.
_note: No textual or logical conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional material review statute.
